llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The board president stated 'Haven't hear none' when asking if there were any changes to the agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve. So moved. I'll second. All those in favor.

items.intro_words: Roll call. Please. Someone. Trustee Weekly. Present.
Roll call. Please. Someone. Trustee Weekly. Present.
Item 4.2. Reported on closed session. In closed session
So welcome everyone to another Redwood City School district board meeting.
Are there any changes to the agenda? Great. Haven't hear none.
Can I please get a motion to approve the agenda? So moved.
Is there any oral communication? Yes, we have a speaker card from Chris Roble.
Moving on with bond program consent items. Can I please get a motion to approve.
So moving on to school and community reports. Presentation on schools
Good evening, Susanna. How are you? Yeah, no, no, there's a button there.
Still under discussion, items 12.1. Discussion of recommendation of mathematic curriculum adoption
Item 13, consent agenda items. Can I please get a motion?
Item 15, board and superintendent reports. No, I think there's 14.6.
Item 15, board and superintendent reports. No, I think there's 14.6.
Anything else? No. Okay. And then other business suggested items.
So Tuesday morning, around what time? 8:45. We'll be out by 8:50.
Okay, board meeting calendar. The item for March 22nd.
With that, it is 9:31. Who would like to make a motion?
